title: AWS (Amazon Web Services)
subTitle: Production cloud infrastructure for scalable, reliable services
overviewContent: I run production workloads on AWS with a focus on availability, security and cost. On the H & H Lawyers rebuild I containerised services onto ECS Fargate (images stored in ECR) behind an Application Load Balancer, with RDS for relational data, S3 + CloudFront for a global CDN, Route 53 and ACM for DNS/TLS, Cognito (with Azure AD SSO) for authentication, Secrets Manager for credentials, and CloudWatch for observability — all deployed through GitHub Actions using OIDC rather than long-lived keys. Earlier work used Elastic Beanstalk with load balancing for reliable multi-region access.
